## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where appropriate.
- [ ] I confirmed there are no unrelated changes in this PR.
- [ ] I linked relevant issues (if any).

## Notes for reviewers

Anything specific reviewers should focus on.
